Strictly Confidential — MNPI — Board Memorandum re Project Tarsier (Liyab Energy Holdings, Inc.) for PSE listing and primary offer.
Embargoed until 18 August 2026, 09:00 PHT, subject to SEC clearance under the Securities Regulation Code and PSE disclosure timetable.
Approval sought: execution of definitive Underwriting Agreement and Share Subscription Agreement for a PHP 2,400,000,000 primary issuance representing approximately 15.5% of the post-offer outstanding shares.
Counterparties include Mangrove Securities, Inc. as sole global coordinator and Kalinga Capital Partners V, L.P. as anchor, with counsel Atty. Rina Mercado (rina.mercado@liyabenergy.ph; +63 28 555 0199) and external counsel Atty. Joaquin Valdez of Bar & Copper Law.
Conditions precedent: BSP no-objection and escrow opening at Star Banyan Bank–Ortigas branch, BIR confirmatory ruling on tax-free exchanges, and PSE approval of the listing application.
The SPA and UA contain customary representations, warranties, and MAE provisions; no Material Adverse Change has occurred or been notified as of this memo, and this memo does not constitute notice of a MAC.
HR matters: approval of a PHP 65,000,000 retention pool for key employees of Liyab Energy Services OPC, with Data Privacy Act compliance onboarding and 18-month cliff vesting to be administered by Ms. Celine Magat, HR Director.
Financial guidance in the draft IR deck (v12) includes non-public FY2026 EBITDA of PHP 780,000,000 (+22% YoY) and distribution policy targets; do not circulate externally prior to the embargo lift.
Public-source references in the IR appendix (e.g., PSE Renewable Index methodology and DOE resource maps) are included for context only and are not MNPI.
Research note by Baybay Equity Research dated May 2024 is stale and should not be relied upon for valuation in the investor-relations draft.
Banking facilities: consent letters required from Rural First Bank of San Esteban for the PHP 950,000,000 revolving credit; covenant compliance certificate to be signed by Engr. Mateo Laxa, CFO.
